metaTitle: Image Blur — Blur Photos & Hide Sensitive Info (Free & Private)
metaDescription: Blur your images instantly in your browser to protect privacy or create artistic bokeh effects. 100% private — your photos never leave your device. No upload required.
introSummary: Protect your digital privacy with our professional Image Blur tool. Designed for users who need to censor sensitive information—like faces, license plates, or confidential text in screenshots—without risking their data on a server. Using advanced client-side Gaussian blur algorithms, our tool ensures that your original images stay on your device while you create secure, blurred versions for sharing or design.

contextUsage.title: For Privacy & Censorship
contextUsage.desc: Quickly hide faces, home addresses, or bank details in photos and screenshots before posting them on social media or public forums.

contextUsage.title: For Web & UI Design
contextUsage.desc: Create soft, abstract background textures or 'glassmorphism' effects by blurring high-resolution stock photos for your website headers.

contextUsage.title: For Professional Portfolios
contextUsage.desc: Apply a gentle blur to background distractions in portrait shots to make your main subject pop with a professional 'bokeh' look.

howto.description: Drag and drop or click to select your image (JPG, PNG, WebP). Since we use local processing, even large files load instantly without using data.
Slide the 'Blur Strength' controller. Our real-time engine shows the exact level of censorship or artistic softening as you move the slider.
Check the preview to ensure sensitive details are unreadable. For maximum security, use a higher intensity to prevent AI-based de-blurring.
Click 'Blur & Save'. The processed image is generated directly in your browser and saved to your device in high fidelity.

why: Absolute Privacy — Unlike other tools, your sensitive photos are never uploaded to a server. Everything happens locally in your browser's sandbox.
No-Upload Technology — Save bandwidth and time. Since there's no upload/download from a server, the process is instantaneous.
High-Fidelity Output — Maintains the original dimensions and aspect ratio of your photo while applying smooth Gaussian blur.
Artistic & Functional — Perfect for both 'Bokeh' aesthetics and 'Censorship' requirements for legal or personal documents.
Universal Format Support — Works seamlessly with JPG, PNG, and modern WebP formats for maximum compatibility.
100% Free & Unlimited — No watermarks, no registration, and no daily limits. Just a clean, professional utility.

faq.q: Is this tool safe for blurring ID cards or bank statements?
faq.a: Yes. This is the safest way to blur sensitive data. Because the code runs entirely on your computer (client-side), no one—not even our team—can see your image.
Gaussian blur is a widely used image-processing algorithm that reduces image noise and detail. It creates a smooth, mathematically consistent 'foggy' effect.

Once an image is blurred and saved, the original pixel information is permanently lost. While some AI tools try to 'guess' what was underneath, a high-intensity blur makes reconstruction practically impossible.

faq.q: Does blurring reduce the file size?
faq.a: Surprisingly, no. Blurring can sometimes increase file size slightly because it creates complex color gradients that are harder for standard compression (like JPG) to optimize.

faq.q: Can I blur just the background?
faq.a: This tool currently applies a global blur. To blur only the background, you would need to use this tool in combination with a background removal or masking tool.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Instant real-time rendering without server latency
Censored content remains 100% private on user's device
Preserves original color accuracy while blurring

troubleshooting: Text still readable? If you can still see outlines of sensitive text, move the slider to at least 40% or run the image through the tool twice for a 'Double Blur'.
Page crashed on large image? For extremely high-resolution photos (8K+), your browser's memory might limit processing. Try resizing the image slightly before blurring.
Save button not working? Ensure you have granted your browser permission to download files to your local storage.
proTips: For 'Aesthetic Blur', try a setting of 5-15. For 'Censorship', always go above 30 to ensure data is completely unreadable.
Combine this with a 'Crop' tool first to isolate a sensitive area, blur it, and then share only the blurred segment.
Blurring a screenshot before sharing it in a professional Slack or Discord channel is the best way to maintain office confidentiality.
